selected_candidate: Add continuation_contract_reason to AtlasRecommendationFoundryRollup and require it in schema and closure validation.
alternatives_rejected: Rely on Command readback only; rejected because Foundry rollup is an independent closure artifact.
Only add schema; rejected because generated Foundry rollups and validation needed the binding.
Encode the reason inside exact_next_action text; rejected because the reason must be structured and comparable.
decision: Generate, validate, schema-bind, and production-readiness assert Foundry rollup continuation_contract_reason.
